subject: Fw: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna - Updated Video
body:

Date: Sun, 30 Dec 2007 11:37:39

Subject: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna - Updated Video


Hi Jeffrey. 
  
Find below an updated video of the “Hydraulic Compression Motor” produced yesterday during a test in Vienna. 
  
www.skapa.at/hcm/hcm_20071229.mpg <http://www.skapa.at/hcm/hcm_20071229.mpg> 
  
File size: 25MB 
  
Mark 
  
  
  
 
  
Mark A. Patzelt
